name: KETSUEKIBURI: AKAIRO KIRI NO JUTSU (BLOOD STYLE: RED MIST JUTSU)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 6

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 2

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 19

Components: H, P, 1 point of Constitution damage

The user expels a fog of blood from his veins. While inside this fog, your allies gain 20% concealment and any enemies must make a Fortitude save or be sickened for the duration of the jutsu (or until they have spent a full round outside of the fog). While inside the cloud, the Constitution cost for the user to form a blood weapon is reduced by 1 point. The cloud is a 5 ft. Radius and at least one square must be adjacent to the user when the cloud is formed.

Requires: Blood Mage (f), Blood Weapon (Small) (a)

Empower: The user may increase the radius of the technique by 5 ft. by spending an extra 2 points of Constitution (the cloud cannot be more than 5 ft. in radius for every 4 levels the caster has, max 20 ft.).

Special -If the user is inside or adjacent to the cloud when the duration of the jutsu expires, he regains the Constitution lost when casting the technique.

system.range: One square must be adjacent to the user
